ddls:
CREATE TABLE "batteries" (
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battery model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the battery model */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the battery */,
  "battery_type" TEXT /* Type of battery (e.g., Lithium-ion, Lead-acid) */,
  "cell_chemistry" TEXT /* Cell chemistry of the battery (e.g., NMC, LFP) */,
  "ah_capacity" REAL /* Ampere-hour (Ah) capacity of the battery */,
  "voltage" REAL /* Voltage (V) of the battery */,
  "wh_capacity" REAL /* Watt-hour (Wh) capacity of the battery */,
  "cycles_50_dod" INTEGER /* Number of cycles the battery can handle at 50% depth of discharge (DoD) */,
  "avg_price" REAL /* Average price of the battery */,
  "avg_cost_per_kwh_cycle" REAL /* Average cost per kWh per cycle */,
  "warranty_years" INTEGER /* Warranty period in years */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the battery data was last updated */,
  "energy_density" REAL /* Energy density of the battery */,
  "depth_of_discharge" REAL /* Maximum depth of discharge (DoD) for optimal performance */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the battery */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions (LxWxH) of the battery */,
  "operating_temperature_range" TEXT /* Operating temperature range */,
  "self_discharge_rate" REAL /* Self-discharge rate of the battery */,
  "charge_time" TEXT /* Time it takes to fully charge the battery */,
  "discharge_time" TEXT /* Time it takes to fully discharge the battery */,
  "cycle_life_80_dod" INTEGER /* Number of cycles the battery can handle at 80% depth of discharge (DoD) */,
  "cycle_life_100_dod" INTEGER /* Number of cycles the battery can handle at 100% depth of discharge (DoD) */,
  "warranty_conditions" TEXT /* Any conditions or limitations of the warranty */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the battery has (e.g., UL, CE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batteries_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES manufacturers ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturer */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the manufacturer */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the manufacturer was founded */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees at the manufacturer */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the manufacturer */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Any certifications the manufacturer has (e.g., ISO 9001) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "order_number" TEXT /* Unique order number for reference */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order to which the item belongs */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery model in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the battery model ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the battery model */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price for the battery model in the order */,
  "customization_options" TEXT /* Any customization options selected by the customer */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated delivery date for the item */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date for the item */,
  "backorder_status" TEXT /* Backorder status (e.g., in stock, backordered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "credit_limit" REAL /* Credit limit for the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company the customer represents */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the customer is in */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the customer's company */,
  "number_of_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the customer's company */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date the customer started doing business with the company */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "battery_id" INTEGER /* ID of the battery model in inventory */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the battery model */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level to trigger restocking */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last restocked */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the inventory (e.g., warehouse ID) */,
  "last_audited_date" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last audited */,
  "next_audit_date" TEXT /* Date the next inventory audit is scheduled */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Supplier of the inventory */,
  "supplier_lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking from the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_battery_id FOREIGN KEY ("battery_id") REFERENCES batteries ("battery_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, sales, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "last_logout_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged out */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the BMS */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the BMS was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., battery, order, inventory) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
